_about: Counter dataset for the AoM Retold Counter Companion. All 23 major gods, 7 pantheon rosters, 72 minor gods, and the myth unit catalog are populated. Verified against multiple sources; low-confidence minor-god myth attributions carry confidence:'low'. See README.md.

ranged.label: Ranged soldier
ranged.description: Archers and other ranged human soldiers.

siege.label: Siege weapon
siege.description: Anti-building artillery, slow and fragile in melee.

myth.label: Myth unit
myth.description: Mythological creatures granted by minor gods.

hero.label: Hero
hero.description: Champion units, strong against myth units.

counterRoles.general: Well-rounded unit with no single hard target.

categoryCounters._comment: The reliable rock-paper-scissors core of AoM Retold. Each category lists the categories that beat it.

counterPlan._comment: Recommendation engine. For an enemy unit of category KEY, recommend units filling the listed roster roles from the PLAYER god's pantheon, in order. note is the plain-language tip shown in the app.

infantry.note: Hit enemy infantry with your counter-infantry unit, backed by ranged soldiers.

ranged.note: Close the gap on enemy ranged units with cavalry or your counter-archer unit.

cavalry.note: Block enemy cavalry with your dedicated anti-cavalry unit.

siege.note: Siege is slow and fragile. Rush it with fast cavalry or infantry.

myth.note: Myth units are beaten by heroes. Always keep heroes in your army.

hero.note: Heroes fall to massed human soldiers. Focus them down together.

building.note: Use siege weapons to bring down buildings.

_rosterNotes.norse: No dedicated foot-archer role. The Throwing Axeman (counterInfantry) is a ranged infantry unit and is the closest Norse equivalent. This reflects the Norse lacking true archers.
_rosterNotes.chinese: No dedicated counterInfantry role. Anti-infantry duty falls to the ranged Fire Archer and Chu Ko Nu. This reflects a known Chinese roster weakness.
_rosterNotes.aztec: The siege role is filled by Otontin Smasher, an anti-building infantry unit, because the Aztecs field no siege engines.
_rosterNotes._appNote: When counterPlan lists a role a pantheon lacks, the app falls back to the next role in the list.

gr_myrmidon.name: Myrmidon
gr_myrmidon._note: Fortress unit. Bonus damage vs non-Greek human soldiers.

gr_hetairos.name: Hetairos
gr_hetairos._note: Fortress unit. Cavalry also effective against buildings.

gr_amazon_archer.name: Amazon Archer
gr_amazon_archer._note: Fortress unit, added in update 19.5934. Replaced the Harpy, which moved to the Temple.

gr_gastraphetoros.name: Gastraphetoros
gr_gastraphetoros._note: Fortress unit. Long-range ranged soldier also effective against buildings.

pantheonThreats._comment: The threats a player faces from ANY major god of the opponent's pantheon, since base military units are shared within a pantheon. Ordered by default priority (1 = highest). The app shows threats[opponentGod.pantheon] plus any godSpecificThreats[opponentGod].

godSpecificThreats._comment: God-specific extra threats: Fortress/unique units, appended to pantheonThreats for that god. Verified entries reference real unit ids. Myth-unit threats are NOT here; see mythLayerStatus.

mythLayerStatus._comment: Enemy myth units are computed: for opponent god G, possible myth units = the union of minorGods[m].mythUnits for every m in godMinorChoices[G] across all three ages. Display each as 'possible'. All resolve to the player's hero via counterPlan.myth.
mythLayerStatus.lowConfidenceNote: Minor gods with confidence:'low' have myth-unit attributions resting on a single or circumstantial source (most Japanese and several Aztec minor gods, plus Greek Hephaestus/Hera, Norse Heimdall, Atlantean Helios/Hekate, Chinese Houtu/Rushou). Re-verify after future patches.

counterOverrides._comment: Player-god-specific exceptions to counterPlan, keyed by player god id then threat unit id. Empty for now; add only where a god's bonuses make the generic recommendation clearly wrong.

malinalxochitl.name: Malinalxochitl
malinalxochitl._note: Myth unit not yet confirmed by a reliable source.
